event_description: User clicked the 'Continue with GitHub' button to begin OAuth authentication.
User successfully created a new Bella organization.
User clicked logout from the dashboard sidebar.
User successfully connected a new AI provider account (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI).
User deleted a provider account, removing its credentials and usage source.
User manually triggered a usage sync for a provider account.
User connected or rotated the PostHog webhook integration secret.
User sent a message to the Bella AI agent in the chat interface.
User submitted a slash command (e.g. /summary, /providers) to the Bella agent.
User selected a different AI model in the chat model selector.
User added a new BYOK LLM API key for the Bella agent.
User removed a BYOK LLM API key from the organization.
User opened an incident detail page to investigate a PostHog signal.
